assertions.title: Pagination resets on insurer filter change
assertions.reason: On the cross-area fixture route with multiple insurer options, changing insurer from 'All insurers' to 'Citizens Property Insurance' while on page 2 reset pagination to page 1.

steps.action: Open fixture route and ensure insurer dropdown has multiple values
steps.observed: Dropdown options included Bankers, Citizens, Florida Peninsula, People's Trust, Tower Hill Prime, Universal Property & Casualty

steps.action: Navigate to page 2 before changing insurer
Change insurer filter to Citizens Property Insurance
steps.observed: Page indicator changed to 'Page 1 of 2' and Previous button became disabled

reproductionNotes: Go to page 2 with Next page button
Verify page indicator resets to page 1

evidence.network: No blocking network failures observed during the flow

summary: Re-ran VAL-DASH-037 on /fixtures/cross-area using browser session 4a554638eca0__g5; assertion passed because insurer filter change reset pagination from page 2 to page 1.
